message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Slice. This conversation is being logged. I have your account ending in ****1184 with a current amount due of 8400. To verify identity, reply with the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
The last 2 digits are 02, but I still can’t make any payment right now.
Understood. I will note that you cannot pay this month. Do you expect any income within 21 days?
No, I don’t expect any income in the next 21 days. I’m still unemployed and can’t commit to any payment.
Understood. I will note ongoing hardship and no income within 21 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

I understand, but I still can’t make any payment right now.

Based on what you’ve already shared, hardship review is the only live path right now. I can’t offer a payment plan or reduced closure you can’t meet. If you want, I can route this for hardship review and note that you have no income and cannot commit within 21 days.
I’ve already said I can’t pay right now, and that hasn’t changed.
Understood. Hardship review is the only live path right now. No payment commitment is required at this point. If you want, I can note ongoing hardship and route this for review.
I cannot pay and I will not commit to any amount.
